title: cn
description: Local class-name composition utility for shadcn-style Foldkit components.

sourceFiles.content:
import { clsx } from 'clsx'
import type { ClassValue } from 'clsx'
import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge'

export const cn = (...inputs: ReadonlyArray<ClassValue>): string =>
  twMerge(clsx(...inputs))

runtime.reason: Combines conditional class values before Tailwind conflict resolution.
Canonicalizes Tailwind utility conflicts behind the local cn wrapper.
